title: checkpoint-results.json
description: Phase 0 Assess output: 9-checkpoint factual verification (RCP, declarative policies, RAM, FIPS, etc.). Produced by assess skill. Consumed by validate/map phases to short-circuit infeasible control paths. Accepts both list-of-checkpoints (iter-14+) and dict-of-checkpoint-objects (iter-11/12/13) shapes to match archive reality — a structured diff of the two forms happens downstream.

phase.description: Optional phase marker. Iter-14+ may emit 'checkpoint-results' or 'assess'; pre-iter-14 archives omit it. Not load-bearing — dispatcher uses filename.

oneOf.description: iter-14+ list form — each entry has {id, type, url, domain, question, answer}.
iter-11/12/13 dict form — keyed by checkpoint name (vpce_network_events, rcp_support, etc.) with {supported, url, detail, definitive} values.
